messages.subject: [R-SIG-Finance] (xts) Feedback requested on C-level as-of join function (PR #437)
messages.subject_clean: (xts) Feedback requested on C-level as-of join function (PR #437)
messages.body_plain:
Hi everyone,

I recently opened a PR for xts that adds a high-performance C-level binary
search implementation for as-of joins. It resolves issue #396 and avoids
allocating large outer-join matrices, which should improve both performance
and memory usage.

PR: https://github.com/joshuaulrich/xts/pull/437

I?d really appreciate any feedback or a review from folks familiar with the
C internals of xts whenever you have the time, happy to clarify anything
about the implementation or make changes if needed.

Thanks!
Dhairya

	[[alternative HTML version deleted]]
